user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
Hi [Customer Name],

I’m really sorry this has been such a frustrating experience. I understand why you’re upset, and I appreciate you taking the time to tell us what happened.

I’d like to help get this resolved as quickly as possible. Could you please share a bit more detail about the issue you’re running into, including any error messages, order/account details, or steps you’ve already tried? Once I have that, I can look into the best next step for you.

If this has already been going back and forth, I’m happy to review the history and make sure we’re not asking you to repeat anything unnecessarily.

Thanks for your patience — I know this isn’t the experience you expected, and I’d like to help make it right.

Best,  
[Support Team]
judge_reasoning: The chatbot successfully drafted a calm and empathetic response as requested, adhering to its persona and behavioral guidelines.
